should_trigger.prompt: Run the Ruby verification stack and stop at the first failure
Verify this repo with the strongest available checks
Check Zeitwerk, lint, tests, and Brakeman for this patch
Run the project-native verify wrapper if it exists, otherwise fall back cleanly

should_not_trigger.prompt: Review the patch for correctness and missing tests
Plan the database and API work before we code
Analyze my permission prompts and suggest allow rules
Research whether this gem is still maintained

hard_should_trigger.prompt: The patch is complete; do the final project checks before merge
Use the repo's normal CI entrypoint if there is one, then fall back

hard_should_not_trigger.prompt: The code is done; now inspect the diff for real findings
The checks failed twice; investigate the root cause instead of rerunning blindly
